creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Here’s the PERFECT day trip itinerary to Sarasota, Florida! 

1. Breakfast at Toastique
2. Selby Botanical Gardens 
3. Lunch at Focaccia Sandwich+Bakery 
4. Ringling Museum 
5. Dinner at The Cottage in Siesta Key Village 
6. Sunset walk on Siesta Key Beach 

Have you been to any of these places?? Let me know in the comments! 

#floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #siestakeybeach #sarasotaflorida

transcription.text: Here's how to spend the perfect day trip in beautiful Sarasota, Florida. Start off by getting breakfast at Tostique in downtown Sarasota. I love their fresh-pressed juices and unique toasts. It's so delicious. Next, you're going to Selby Botanical Gardens. This is a 15-acre urban tropical garden oasis with beautiful walking paths, places to sit and enjoy the grounds, and an amazing koi fish pond. You can even buy a bag of fish food and feed them. Next, you're going to have lunch at Focaccia Sandwich and Bakery for inventive and delicious focaccia sandwiches. I just love this little place. Next, you're going to explore the Ringling Museum. This is a 66-acre property that includes a massive art collection, the Cottazon, which was Ringling's winter home, a fun circus museum, and don't skip out on exploring through the banyan trees. Then, head out to Siesta Key Village and have dinner at the cottage. Be sure to sit on the back patio and enjoy live music with dinner and drinks. Lastly, go to Siesta Key Beach and walk off dinner while watching the sunset. They don't get any better than right here on Siesta. Be sure to save this post and send it to someone you would want to take a day trip with.
